Where it started

Where I Started

I've Done
It All.

10th November 2015. I'd just got paid. Eighteen years old. The first thing I did was walk into The Gym Group on Jamaica Street in Glasgow and pay my first membership. A mate had looked at me and said I was quite skinny and it would probably help. That was enough for me. So I went.

I was 52kg.

For years after that I trained like it was the only thing that mattered. Filmed my lifts. Tracked everything. Showed up consistently. Did all the things you're supposed to do. And got almost nowhere. No coach. No real structure. Just effort and stubbornness going in the wrong direction for a long time.

Eleven years I've been at this now. The coaching side came later. A friend who was already a coach told me I was more than capable of doing it myself. I didn't believe him. Smiled, nodded, and carried on thinking it wasn't for me. Then one day I just stopped waiting until I felt ready.

Best decision I ever made.

I'm not a coach because I've always had it figured out. I'm a coach because I spent years not having it figured out and I know exactly what that feels like. The frustration of doing everything right and seeing nothing. The self doubt. The wondering if you're just not built for it.

You are. You just need the right system and someone who actually gives a shit.

About Rhys

✓ Walked the Walk

I Think Like
A Scientist.

My background is science. I wanted to be a doctor. Didn't get past the interview stage. At the time I was gutted. But it was a blessing in disguise. The drive to help people never went away. It just ended up here instead.

I've coached hundreds of people. Not because I sell a dream, but because I build a system that actually works. I look at what you're doing, break down what isn't working, fix it, and build something that fits around your life.

Not a template. Not a PDF. A proper plan with a real coach behind it.

I think like a scientist. I diagnose, fix, and track. That's why every client I work with gets results. Guaranteed.
🔬
Science backed
Evidence first. No bro science. No magic supplements.
⚙️
System driven
Effort without a system is wasted. We fix the system.
🧠
Habit focused
Results that stick come from habits, not willpower alone.
💬
Direct access
Not a chatbot. Not a generic reply. You get me.

What's Included

Everything You Need.
Nothing You Don't.

01
A Programme That Actually Fits You
Most people plateau because they're running someone else's plan. Yours is built around your schedule, your equipment, and how your body responds. That's why it works when nothing else has.
02
Nutrition That Doesn't Make You Miserable
If you've tried eating clean and given up, it's because the plan didn't fit your life. We work with what you actually eat, tighten it where it matters, and get you to a deficit or surplus without dreading every meal.
03
Habits That Make Results Stick
Motivation runs out. Habits don't. We build the daily behaviours that mean you stay consistent even when life gets in the way. That's the difference between a 12 week result and a permanent one.
04
Weekly Check Ins That Keep You Moving
Every week I look at your training data, your food, your measurements, and tell you exactly what to adjust. No guessing. No waiting to see if something's working. We know, and we act on it.
05
Form Fixes That Unlock Progress
Bad technique doesn't just cause injuries. It means you're not hitting the muscle you think you are, and your lifts stall. Send me a clip, I'll fix it. Better form means better results every single session.
06
A Coach Who Adapts When Life Does
Got a holiday coming? Injured? Stressed at work? Most programmes fall apart the moment life happens. Mine doesn't. You get me directly, and the plan adjusts around your reality. That's why people stay consistent.

Common Questions

Let's Clear
It Up.

Do I need to train in person?
Nope. I coach online and in person. Most clients are fully online and it works just as well. If you want in person or hybrid we can make that work too.
I've been training for years. Is this still for me?
That's exactly who this is for. If you've been going to the gym consistently and you're not where you want to be, the training isn't the problem. The system is. That's what I fix.
Do I need to track my food?
Honestly, probably. Most people think they're eating well but they're guessing half their meals. We'll figure out what level of tracking works for you without making it miserable.
How quick will I see results?
Depends where you're starting. But if you've been spinning your wheels for a while you'll notice changes within a few weeks. Not because of anything magic. Just because someone's finally pointed your effort in the right direction.
What if I've got injuries or limitations?
Good. That's my thing. Dodgy shoulder, bad knee, old back injury. I've worked around all of it. Pain free progress isn't a bonus. It's the baseline.
What makes RDHcoaching different?
I've done it all myself. I know what it takes in practice, not just in theory. I think like a scientist, not a hype man. And every single client gets results.

Not Quite Ready?

Have a Chat
With Rhys.

Not everyone's ready to commit straight away. That's completely fine. If you want to talk through your situation before deciding anything, book a free call and we'll have an honest conversation.

No pressure. No pitch. Just a straight conversation about where you're at, what isn't working, and whether coaching makes sense for you right now.

I've coached hundreds of people. I know within a few minutes of talking whether I can genuinely help someone. I'll tell you the truth either way.
